privileged_info_summary: This is a Docker signal handling troubleshooting task involving three production services: acme-webserver, acme-scheduler, and acme-processor. The webserver container fails to handle SIGTERM because its Dockerfile uses shell-form CMD (CMD python3 /app/server.py), which wraps the Python process in /bin/sh that doesn't forward signals to PID 1. The scheduler container has a missing 'exec' statement in its entrypoint.sh script, causing bash to remain as PID 1 instead of replacing with the Python process. The processor container lacks an init system (tini or --init flag) for proper zombie process reaping. The admin user is 'ga' with password 'password123', and the project directory is located at /home/ga/projects/signal-fix. The task requires fixing all three services, rebuilding images, verifying graceful shutdown in under 4.5 seconds, and writing a report to /home/ga/Desktop/signal_handling_report.txt. The pass threshold for scoring is 60 out of 100 points.
